data.title: Koori no Jouheki
data.synopsis:
On the surface, high school student Koyuki "Koyun" Hikawa seems unapproachable and terrifying to most other students. In reality, Koyun is just insecure and prone to overthinking due to her uncomfortable experiences in middle school. However, her chance encounter with two boys in school—Minato Amamiya and Youta Hino—sparks a change in her. Like her friend Miki Azumi, the boys are never afraid to approach Koyun and see her for who she really is.

Although Koyun starts spending more time with Miki, Minato, and Youta, she finds herself torn between her newfound bliss and her fear of getting too attached to others. Meanwhile, each of her friends quietly struggles with their own challenges. But as the new friend group continues to navigate high school together, Koyun and the others start to break out of their shells and enjoy their adolescence to the fullest.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: のっと・せくさろいど・エウリィ!

data.title: Notto Sexaroid Eurie!
data.title_japanese: のっと・せくさろいど・エウリィ!
data.synopsis: Sexual crimes committed by men are on the rise worldwide. To combat them and ensure the safety of the population, "Sexaroids" female robots designed for sexual purposes have been deployed. Eurie, one of these Sexaroids, is sent on a solo mission to Tengestu, a region where sexual crimes have reached extremely high levels. Eurie's goal was to protect men from danger, but she ends up helping them fulfill their needs...

The Colors Within Special Dance Video
きみの色 劇中歌「水金地火木土天アーメン」描き下ろしSPダンスPV
data.synopsis:
Naoko Yamada-directed anime film Kimi no Iro (The Colors Within) released a special "dance" promotional video – though, it's a little more on-beat for the creator who enjoys showcasing her characters goofing around and showing their personality through movement.

The special dance trailer contains wholly original footage, presented in a TikTok-like format and follows the three main characters, Kimi, Totsuko and Rui, dancing along to the insert song "Sui Kin Chi Ka Moku Dotten Amen" with moves that are reminiscent of those popular with those who upload short-form dance videos.

(Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

data.title: Shijian Zhizi
data.synopsis:
The cold-faced killer Shiqi meets Qianxiao, a sunny girl from a fishing village, connected by the mysterious wheel of time, embark on a fantasy and romantic time journey of "pausing the whole world and going back in time to love you".

(Source: IMDb)
